contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Deploy stripe-session-prefill GAS change + complete admin@truesight.me migration of DApp qrCodes route
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/195
  
  Details:
  Deployment + migration cleanup for PRs #257 / #259 / #194. (1) clasp pushed canonical qr_code_web_service.gs to both the admin@truesight.me project HEAD (scriptId 1MnAsIQA...) and the legacy 1slQVojn... HEAD as a safety net. (2) clasp redeployed v2 of admin@truesight.me to bind its 'Anyone'-accessible URL (AKfycbyGD0CD...) to the new HEAD code. (3) Discovered that DApp routes.js > directGas.qrCodes still pointed at the legacy pre-migration deployment (AKfycbxigq4-..., scriptId 1y6JVYwq..., owned by the original Google account, running 392-line pre-consolidation web_app.gs) — that's why my deploy didn't surface to the DApp. (4) Repointed routes.js qrCodes to the admin@truesight.me v2 URL (which qrCodeGenerator was already using, so this consolidates onto the migration target). (5) Verified all four GAS endpoints (lookup, list_all, list_with_members, list_unassigned_stripe_sessions) work via the new URL with the new shape (items now include shipping_provider + tracking_number). update_qr_code.html now has end-to-end Stripe-session prefill working in production.
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 50.00

- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
